view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied as evidenced by the booking process described in the linked use case.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied as evidenced by the booking process described in the linked use case.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for 'Fixed-duration appointments (e.g., 50 minutes)' as the linked use case explicitly states that clients see available 50-minute slots when booking. Additionally, the prior step evidence shows that customers have successfully booked appointments with confirmed durations, confirming the functionality of fixed-duration appointments. The evidence from the 'customer-book-primary' step indicates that the booking process is operational and meets the specified requirement.
